name: Exterior Archetype - Compact Settlement
required_conditions: The exterior is one compact, quickly-readable settlement, not a sprawling town.
Elara House, Shop, Inn, and Elder House each have a reachable, distinct entrance.
A dominant civic well anchors the settlement's path hierarchy.
At least one boundary route mouth is preserved toward the wider world.

provenance.notes: WO-0071 disposable fixture archetype, not a production-corroborated pattern. Its modules_required/landmark_slots exist to exercise MapVision + TileAssembly resolution end to end (see tile_assembly_catalog.py / map_vision_resolution.py), not to encode a finished Ashford layout grammar. village_cottage is deliberately absent from modules_required: the current Ashford TileAssembly catalog has zero enabled candidates for that role (both reference-kit cottage records remain study_only), so a required cottage module would always fail closed -- see test_map_vision_integration.py's dedicated missing_assembly test instead.
